2604.06916.title: FP4 Explore, BF16 Train: Diffusion Reinforcement Learning via Efficient Rollout Scaling
2604.06916.paper_summary: Reinforcement-Learning-based post-training has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for aligning text-to-image diffusion models with human preferences. In recent studies, increasing the rollout group size yields pronounced performance improvements, indicating substantial room for further alignment gains. However, scaling rollouts on large-scale foundational diffusion models (e.g., FLUX.1-12B) imposes a heavy computational burden. To alleviate this bottleneck, we explore the integration of FP4 quantization into Diffusion RL rollouts. Yet, we identify that naive quantized pipelines inherently introduce risks of performance degradation. To overcome this dilemma between efficiency and training integrity, we propose Sol-RL (Speed-of-light RL), a novel FP4-empowered Two-stage Reinforcement Learning framework. First, we utilize high-throughput NVFP4 rollouts to generate a massive candidate pool and extract a highly contrastive subset. Second, we regenerate these selected samples in BF16 precision and optimize the policy exclusively on them. By decoupling candidate exploration from policy optimization, Sol-RL integrates the algorithmic mechanisms of rollout scaling with the system-level throughput gains of NVFP4. This synergistic algorithm-hardware design effectively accelerates the rollout phase while reserving high-fidelity samples for optimization. We empirically demonstrate that our framework maintains the training integrity of BF16 precision pipeline while fully exploiting the throughput gains enabled by FP4 arithmetic. Extensive experiments across SANA, FLUX.1, and SD3.5-L substantiate that our approach delivers superior alignment performance across multiple metrics while accelerating training convergence by up to $4.64\times$, unlocking the power of massive rollout scaling at a fraction of the cost.
2604.06916.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習基礎的後訓練最近出現，成為一種有前景的範式，用於將文本到圖像的擴散模型與人類偏好對齊。<lb/>在最近的研究中，增加展開組的大小會顯著提高性能，這表明進一步對齊的潛力巨大。<lb/>然而，在大型基礎擴散模型（例如 FLUX.1-12B）上擴展展開會帶來沉重的計算負擔。<lb/>為了緩解這一瓶頸，我們探索將 FP4 量化集成到擴散強化學習展開中。<lb/>然而，我們發現天真的量化管道本質上會引入性能下降的風險。<lb/>為了克服效率與訓練完整性之間的這一困境，我們提出了 Sol-RL（光速強化學習），這是一個新穎的 FP4 驅動的兩階段強化學習框架。<lb/>首先，我們利用高通量的 NVFP4 展開生成大量候選池，並提取出高度對比的子集。<lb/>其次，我們以 BF16 精度重新生成這些選定的樣本，並專門在這些樣本上優化策略。<lb/>通過將候選探索與策略優化解耦，Sol-RL 將展開擴展的算法機制與 NVFP4 的系統級通量增益相結合。<lb/>這種協同的算法-硬體設計有效地加速了展開階段，同時保留高保真樣本以進行優化。<lb/>我們經驗性地證明，我們的框架在保持 BF16 精度管道的訓練完整性同時，充分利用 FP4 算術帶來的通量增益。<lb/>在 SANA、FLUX.1 和 SD3.5-L 上進行的廣泛實驗證實，我們的方法在多個指標上提供了卓越的對齊性能，同時將訓練收斂加速高達 $4.64\times$，以極低的成本釋放了大規模展開擴展的潛力。
2604.06916.author: Yitong Li et.al.
2604.06916.authors: Yitong Li, Junsong Chen, Shuchen Xue, Pengcuo Zeren, Siyuan Fu, Dinghao Yang, Yangyang Tang, Junjie Bai, Ping Luo, Song Han, Enze Xie
